message:
fix(proptest): fix compilation errors in proptest_model_registry, proptest_chunking, proptest_reranker

- proptest_model_registry: add missing #![cfg(feature = "semantic-search")] gate
- proptest_chunking: fix move-out-of-Vec for String field in prop_assert_eq!,
  add #[allow(dead_code)] on unused arb_recorder_event strategy
- proptest_reranker: replace wildcard match with explicit variant, use .to_vec()
  instead of .iter().map(|d| d.clone()).collect()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
